name: AI/LLM Pipeline Compromise
description: Attack tree modelling compromise of AI/ML training and inference pipelines including LLM-based systems
root_objective: Compromise AI pipeline to poison models, exfiltrate training data, or manipulate inference outputs

nodes.title: Compromise AI/ML Pipeline
nodes.description: Poison training data, manipulate model outputs, or exfiltrate sensitive training data from AI systems

nodes.title: Poison Training Data
nodes.description: Inject malicious data into training pipelines to create backdoors or degrade model performance

nodes.title: Compromise Data Source/Crawlers
nodes.description: Inject poisoned content into web sources or data feeds consumed by training pipelines

nodes.title: Modify Training Dataset in Storage
nodes.description: Gain access to training data repositories and inject carefully crafted poisoned samples

nodes.title: Attack LLM Inference via Prompt Injection
nodes.description: Manipulate LLM-based systems through prompt injection to bypass guardrails or exfiltrate data

nodes.title: Direct Prompt Injection
nodes.description: Craft inputs that override system instructions to extract sensitive information or bypass safety controls

nodes.title: Indirect Prompt Injection via Data Sources
nodes.description: Embed malicious instructions in documents or web content consumed by RAG or tool-using LLM agents

nodes.title: Exfiltrate Training Data / Model
nodes.description: Extract proprietary training data or model weights through API abuse or system compromise

nodes.title: Model Extraction via API Queries
nodes.description: Systematically query prediction API to reconstruct a functional copy of the model

nodes.title: Training Data Extraction from LLM
nodes.description: Use targeted prompting to extract memorized training data including PII or proprietary content

nodes.title: Compromise ML Infrastructure
nodes.description: Attack the underlying ML platform, model registry, or serving infrastructure

nodes.title: Supply Chain Attack on ML Library
nodes.description: Introduce malicious code through compromised ML framework dependency or model hub
